title: DaxterCraft Modpack Current
description: Current Modpack for the DaxterCraft Server, based on create and tinker's
body:
Current Modpack for the DaxterCraft Server, this modpack is not intended for public use but if you like the mod selection feel free to try!

This modpack adds create with various addons like [Create: Estrogen](https://modrinth.com/mod/estrogen), [Hephaestus](https://modrinth.com/mod/hephaestus) a very cool tinker's port to fabric and various more optimization mods just to make the game run smoothly.

Explore the world with new biomes with [BWG](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone).


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

you just lost the game.

</details>
